label: Establishing Wide
desc: Weitwinkel-Einführung eines Ortes. Raum, Stimmung, Kontext.
template: Film still from a [MODIFIER] [GENRE] film. [LOCATION] seen from [PERSPECTIVE] at [TIME_OF_DAY]. [2-3 DETAILS]. [LIGHT_SOURCE]. [WHAT_IS_DARK]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.label: Modifier
fields.placeholder: low-budget / independent / 1970s / European / Scandinavian

fields.label: Genre
fields.placeholder: thriller / drama / horror / noir

fields.label: Location
fields.placeholder: A crumbling apartment block / An empty highway

fields.label: Perspective
fields.placeholder: street level / above / the end of the alley

fields.label: Time of Day
fields.placeholder: night / late afternoon / dusk

fields.label: 2-3 Details
fields.placeholder: broken windows, pooling water, a single lit room

fields.label: Light Source
fields.placeholder: Single sodium streetlight casting orange on wet pavement

fields.label: What is Dark
fields.placeholder: Everything beyond 10 metres lost in fog

fields.label: Emotional Hook
fields.placeholder: Nobody is coming back.
examples: Too quiet for a place that looks lived-in.

label: Enger Raum / Korridor
desc: Gasse, Korridor, enger Innenraum. Textur, Lichtlinie, kein Fill.
template: Film still from a [MODIFIER] [GENRE] film shot on location. [SPACE]. [LIGHT_SOURCE] casting [WHAT_WHERE]. [WHAT_IS_DARK]. [SURFACE_TEXTURE]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK], no fill light. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.label: Modifier
fields.placeholder: low-budget / independent

fields.label: Genre
fields.placeholder: thriller / noir

fields.label: Space
fields.placeholder: Narrow concrete corridor, damp walls, single overhead light

fields.label: Light Source
fields.placeholder: Bare bulb at the end of the corridor

fields.label: What / Where
fields.placeholder: a narrow strip of light on the floor tiles

fields.label: What is Dark
fields.placeholder: Both ends of the corridor swallowed in darkness

fields.label: Surface / Texture
fields.placeholder: Peeling paint, water stains, iron railing

fields.label: Emotional Hook
fields.placeholder: Feels like escape. Or exposure.

label: Detail / Close-Up
desc: Objekt oder Textur im CU. Licht auf das Objekt, Rest im Dunkel.
template: Film still, [TIME_OF_DAY] exterior, [GENRE]. Close-up of [OBJECT] in [CONTEXT]. [LIGHT_SOURCE] illuminates [WHAT], rest in [DARK_BLUR]. [TEXTURE]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.label: Time of Day
fields.placeholder: night / late afternoon

fields.label: Genre
fields.placeholder: thriller / drama

fields.label: Object
fields.placeholder: a rusted padlock / a torn photograph / a cracked phone screen

fields.label: Context
fields.placeholder: the corner of a bare wooden table

fields.label: Light Source
fields.placeholder: Sidelight from a half-open window

fields.label: What it lights
fields.placeholder: only the front face of the padlock

fields.label: Rest in
fields.placeholder: shallow focus blur / deep black

fields.label: Texture
fields.placeholder: Pitted metal surface, flaking rust

fields.label: Emotional Hook
fields.placeholder: The kind of afternoon that never ends.
examples: The kind of afternoon that never ends.

label: Charakter (partiell sichtbar)
desc: Figur teilweise im Schatten. Verhindert 'Sticker-Effekt'. Nur sichtbarer Bereich lit.
template: Film still from a [MODIFIER] [GENRE] film shot on location. [FIGURE] seen from [PERSPECTIVE] in [LOCATION]. [LIGHT_SOURCE]. Only [VISIBLE_AREA], rest of figure in [SHADOW]. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.label: Modifier
fields.placeholder: independent / low-budget

fields.label: Genre
fields.placeholder: thriller / drama

fields.label: Figure
fields.placeholder: A woman in a dark coat

fields.label: Perspective
fields.placeholder: the back / from the side / partial front

fields.label: Location
fields.placeholder: a doorway / a narrow stairwell / the edge of a parking lot

fields.label: Light Source
fields.placeholder: Streetlight from the right side

fields.label: Visible Area
fields.placeholder: one shoulder and the edge of her jaw

fields.label: Rest in Shadow
fields.placeholder: near-total darkness

fields.label: Emotional Hook
fields.placeholder: She doesn't know she's being watched.
examples: She doesn't know she's being watched.
The kind of loneliness you chose.

label: Pillow Shot (kein Mensch)
desc: Objekt oder Raum ohne Personen. Häufig vor/nach großer Szene.

fields.label: Genre
fields.placeholder: drama / thriller

fields.label: Object
fields.placeholder: A telephone off the hook / An unmade bed / A stopped clock

fields.label: Context
fields.placeholder: an otherwise empty kitchen

fields.label: Light Source
fields.placeholder: Daylight through frosted glass, flat and grey

fields.label: Emotional Hook
fields.placeholder: Nobody is coming back.
examples: The kind of afternoon that never ends.

label: Oberfläche / Textur
desc: Nur Material und Licht. Starker Hell-Dunkel-Falloff. Kein Subjekt.
template: [TIME_OF_DAY] exterior, [GENRE] film. [SURFACE] lit by [LIGHT_SOURCE] from [DIRECTION]. Strong light-to-shadow falloff. [VISIBLE_AREA], rest in deep black. [EMOTIONAL_HOOK]. [FILMSTOCK]. --ar 16:9 --raw

fields.label: Time of Day
fields.placeholder: Night / Dawn / Late afternoon

fields.label: Genre
fields.placeholder: thriller / horror

fields.label: Surface
fields.placeholder: A brick wall / A wet cobblestone street / An old wooden door

fields.label: Light Source
fields.placeholder: A single sodium streetlight

fields.label: Direction
fields.placeholder: the left / above at 45° / directly below

fields.label: Visible Area
fields.placeholder: Only the top half of the wall in light

fields.label: Emotional Hook
fields.placeholder: Not beautiful — exposed.
